ShortDescription.Value: Automatically revives abandoned buildings instead of letting them rot.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Building Reviver
Hate seeing abandoned husks in your city, but don't want to bulldoze them either? This mod brings them back to life.
## Features - Automatically **revives abandoned buildings**: clears the abandoned status and resets the building's condition, so the game re-lists the property and new occupants move in - Master on/off switch in Options → Mods → Building Reviver - **Adjustable sweep frequency** (1–64 scans per in-game day) - Session statistics, with a reset button - Lightweight: scans a few times per in-game day, no per-frame cost
## Notes - Revival only removes vanilla status components and resets condition, so it's save-safe - Safe to add or remove from a save at any time - If the underlying problem (land value, services, rent) persists, a building can relapse — this mod will simply revive it again on a later sweep - Condemned buildings are intentionally left alone: the game re-condemns them as long as the zoning under them is invalid, so "rescuing" them would achieve nothing. Fix the zoning instead. - Prefer demolition instead? That's my other mod, [Auto Bulldozer](https://mods.paradoxplaza.com/mods/151415/Windows) — the philosophical opposite of this one. Don't run both on the same city, or they'll fight over the same buildings
